items.title: Detroit Pistons Make Big Decision On Daniss Jenkins Before NBA Free Agency
items.author: Yahoo Sports
items.body_excerpt: Detroit Pistons Make Big Decision On Daniss Jenkins Before NBA Free Agency Yahoo Sports

items.title: The Detroit Pistons will exercise the $4 million team option on Daniss Jenkins, league sources told HoopsHype. Jenkins averaged 9.3 points, including shooting 37.4% from 3-point range, with 3.9 assists in 20.2 minutes, while starting 19 of 72 games for the Pistons last season.
items.author: Michael Scotto
items.body_excerpt: The Detroit Pistons will exercise the $4 million team option on Daniss Jenkins, league sources told HoopsHype. Jenkins averaged 9.3 points, including shooting 37.4% from 3-point range, with 3.9 assists in 20.2 minutes, while starting 19 of 72 games for the Pistons last season.

items.title: The Detroit Pistons have picked up their team options for Daniss Jenkins and Tolu Smith, a league source told @spotrac.com.
items.author: KeithSmithNBA
items.body_excerpt: The Detroit Pistons have picked up their team options for Daniss Jenkins and Tolu Smith, a league source told @spotrac.com.

items.title: Ebuka Okorie to Detroit after having to start Daniss Jenkins and get Marcus Sasser in the rotation by the end of semifinals to give Cade Cunningham any kind of relief
items.author: Law Murray 📘
items.body_excerpt:
Ebuka Okorie to Detroit after having to start Daniss Jenkins and get Marcus Sasser in the rotation by the end of semifinals to give Cade Cunningham any kind of relief

And also, after trading Jaden Ivey.
